source: PLACEHOLDER — tune Delphes pᵀᵐⁱˢˢ resolution to published PUPPI performance vs sum-E_T; synthesise the covariance for the τʈ mass estimator (decision D1).

notes: STUB. pᵀᵐⁱˢˢ is the most consequential of the three response knobs (note §3.3); covariance synthesis is out of card scope and handled in the ntuplizer/estimator layer.
